**Analyzing strike announcement**

I need to look into the provided HTML content for details on a possible upcoming strike. The title translates to "Metro Line: Notice of general national strike on Friday 3 October 2025 - EAV srl". The date shown is October 2, 2025, and the text mentions a 24-hour national strike called by the labor unions CGIL and USB. It outlines guaranteed service times, confirming it is indeed an announcement about the upcoming strike on October 3, 2025.
